mnemonics: Dimensions Rule! (Rank + Nullity = Dimension of Domain)
Vans in the Parking Lot: The Rank (people in vans) plus the Nullity (empty spaces) equals the total parking spots (dimension).
ROD: Rank + Nullity = Dimension of Domain.
keyPoints: The theorem states that for a linear transformation T: V -> W, rank(T) + nullity(T) = dim(V).
The rank is the dimension of the image (range) of T.
The nullity is the dimension of the kernel (null space) of T.
commonMistakes: Forgetting that the dimension on the right side is of the domain (V), not the codomain (W).
Assuming the theorem applies to non-linear transformations.
Confusing the rank of the transformation with the rank of a matrix representing it in different bases.
